title: EMVA Standard 1288 Release 4.0 Linear
key_contribution: Defines mandatory linear-camera characterization and compliance boundary
data_requirements: Homogeneous calibrated illumination, dark images, exposure series, fixed camera settings
limitations: Not ICCD-specific and cannot be claimed without the prescribed setup

title: EMVA Standard 1288 Release 4.0 General
key_contribution: Extends the standard framework beyond a strictly linear camera
data_requirements: Dark and illuminated stacks with controlled input and known response mapping
limitations: Still requires controlled characterization data

title: ISO 15739:2023 Photography - Electronic still-picture imaging - Noise measurements
key_contribution: Standard methods for reporting noise against signal and dynamic range
data_requirements: Defined signal levels and camera response measurements
limitations: Scope is still-picture cameras, not a direct ICCD compliance claim

title: Photon Transfer
method_family: PTC; gain; read noise; full well
key_contribution: Canonical photon-transfer treatment
data_requirements: Raw bias/dark and paired uniform flats across signal levels
limitations: Book method assumptions must be met; ordinary scenes are not flats

title: The shape of the photon transfer curve of CCD sensors
key_contribution: Shows high-flux PTC departures are tied to neighboring-pixel correlations
data_requirements: Large controlled flat-field series
limitations: Requires flats and cannot be inferred from scene stacks

title: The brighter-fatter effect and pixel correlations in CCD sensors
key_contribution: Connects variance deficits and pixel correlations
data_requirements: Flat fields over flux levels and spot/star data
limitations: CCD charge redistribution is not automatically an ICCD explanation

title: 3D noise photon transfer curve
authors: Bradley L. Preece; David P. Haefner
method_family: 3D spatial variance decomposition; high-gain noise factor
key_contribution: Separates row, column, pixel, temporal and fixed components
data_requirements: Controlled dark/flat image stacks across signal
limitations: Seven-plus fitted curves increase data and identifiability requirements

title: Noise Power Spectrum Measurements in Digital Imaging With Gain Nonuniformity Correction
key_contribution: Shows FPN inflates measured NPS and detrending can be insufficient
data_requirements: Uniform acquisitions and explicit treatment of fixed gain patterns
limitations: Scene spectra must not be labeled detector NPS

title: Exposure Time Dependence of Dark Current in CCD Imagers
authors: Ralf Widenhorn; Justin C. Dunlap; Erik Bodegom
key_contribution: Demonstrates pixel-level dark-current nonlinearity and hot-pixel risk
data_requirements: Matched dark frames from 5 to 7200 s at constant temperature
limitations: Device, temperature and exposure must match

title: The Noise Performance of Electron Multiplying Charge-Coupled Devices
authors: Mark S. Robbins; Benjamin J. Hadwen
key_contribution: Formal treatment and measurement of multiplication noise
data_requirements: Controlled illumination, gain settings and photon-transfer measurements
limitations: EMCCD multiplication is analogous context, not proof of MCP behavior

title: Fixed pattern noise in high-resolution, CCD readout photon-counting detectors
authors: R. Michel; J. L. Fordham; H. Kawakami
key_contribution: Shows event width, centroiding and illumination affect fixed patterns
data_requirements: Photon-counting event data at controlled illumination
limitations: Not applicable when acquisition mode is analog/unknown

title: A simple approach for characterizing the spatially varying sensitivity of microchannel plate detectors
key_contribution: Direct MCP spatial-gain characterization
data_requirements: Resolved single electron/photon hits and accumulated exposure
limitations: Current project lacks resolved hit events

title: On the use of electron-multiplying CCDs for astronomical spectroscopy
authors: Simon M. Tulloch; Vik S. Dhillon
key_contribution: Clarifies regime-dependent gain noise and photon-counting limitations
data_requirements: Known EM gain, flux and threshold regime
limitations: Cannot classify current ICCD mode without acquisition evidence

title: Measuring the Noise of Digital Imaging Sensors by Stacking Raw Images Affected by Vibrations and Illumination Flickering
method_family: stack-based temporal noise under nuisance variation
key_contribution: Demonstrates flicker and micro-motion can bias stack noise estimates
data_requirements: Repeated raw static-scene frames with nuisance modeling
limitations: Current cross-folder scene and illumination stability remain unknown

title: A statistical model for signal-dependent charge sharing in image sensors
key_contribution: Models charge sharing and covariance effects
data_requirements: Controlled flats across signal levels
limitations: Requires controlled illumination and sensor-level evidence

title: TheoH and Allan Deviation as Power-Law Noise Estimators
key_contribution: Authoritative stability-estimator background
data_requirements: Ordered samples with known sampling interval
limitations: Unknown frame interval prevents physical time-scale claims

title: Allan Variance Characterization of Compact Fourier Transform Infrared Spectrometers
authors: George A. Adib; Yasser M. Sabry; Diaa Khalil
key_contribution: Optical-instrument example of separating drift/noise regimes
data_requirements: Time-ordered repeated measurements with timestamps
limitations: Transferable only as an auxiliary stability method

title: The nonlinear photon transfer curve of CCDs and its effects on photometry
journal_or_standard: Science China Physics Mechanics and Astronomy
key_contribution: Highlights saturation-adjacent and covariance effects
data_requirements: Flat fields spanning the linear and high-flux range
limitations: Bibliographic record retained with arXiv access; not a current-data PTC license

title: Practical Poissonian-Gaussian noise modeling and fitting for single-image raw-data
key_contribution: Defines an operational signal-dependent raw-noise model
data_requirements: Raw sensor data and identifiable signal/noise relation
limitations: Model fit is not a detector gain calibration without controlled data

title: Unprocessing Images for Learned Raw Denoising
method_family: synthetic raw noise and inverse pipeline
key_contribution: Shows why raw-domain processing history matters for synthesis
data_requirements: Known/assumed camera pipeline and noise parameters
limitations: Restoration evidence, not detector characterization standard

title: A Physics-Based Noise Formation Model for Extreme Low-Light Raw Denoising
key_contribution: Shows richer electronics noise matters beyond heteroscedastic Gaussian
data_requirements: Bias/flat/raw calibration across camera settings
limitations: CMOS component model cannot be transplanted to ICCD without data

title: A Holistic Approach to Cross-Channel Image Noise Modeling and Its Application to Image Denoising
key_contribution: Shows processing can mix and reshape sensor noise
data_requirements: Repeated real images and known image pipeline context
limitations: Current monochrome/raw-like use makes cross-channel model non-primary

title: Physics-Guided ISO-Dependent Sensor Noise Modeling for Extreme Low-Light Photography
key_contribution: Supports condition-aware modeling only when conditions are observed and calibrated
data_requirements: Paired noisy/clean, flat and bias frames over ISO
limitations: Not evidence that folder IDs or unknown ICCD settings are physical conditions
